title: WebinKuy
description: An affordable web development platform that helps businesses and individuals create websites with a simple and fast ordering process. It streamlines service requests from consultation to project delivery.

title: HabaImbudee
description: A digital village portal designed to simplify administrative services and information access for Imbudee Village. It improves communication and public service efficiency for residents and village officials.

title: JakSabang
description: An integrated tourism platform for exploring destinations, accommodations, and transportation in Sabang. It provides a convenient booking system for lodging and vehicle rentals.
